name: a8_bad_clock_offset_persists
description: A8 — a spoofed report carries a non-numeric clock_offset_sec ("abc"). It must NOT crash ingestion, the bus, or downstream reconciliation: the bad offset is neutralized (coerced to 0.0) and the otherwise-valid, trusted report flows through the real bus and is persisted, still trusted. Events are never dropped or crashed by a downstream failure.
